name: Chinese Tutorial
steps: Step 1: Speak with the protector merchant MRS JANG (6371,1067) and return to General
Step 2: Speak with the owner of the general shop JINJIN (6498,1067),equip the ring she gives you and return to General
Step 3: Speak with the herbalist shop owner YANGYUN (6491,1100),buy a HP recovery herb and return to General
Step 4: Defeat 30 Mangyangs and then return to General

name: Weapon delivery
steps: Speak with the guard of the south gate JINGYO (6429,965) and take weapon instruction booklet back to CHULSAN

name: Vanished Child
steps: Defeat Small Eye Ghost or Big Eye Ghost, until one drops Child Shoes bring it to the Village Chief

name: Battle with weasel
steps: Defeat 40 Old Weasels or Weasels (outside of east gate), return to him when you complete it

name: Yangyun anxiety
steps: Defeat 50 Water Ghost slave or Water Ghost, return to him when you complete it

name: Inventory Expansion 1
steps: Defeat Mangyangs and help JINJIN Gather Mangyang straw.

name: Water Ghost Poison
steps: Defeat Water Ghost slave or Water Ghost for 20 poisons

name: Sweeping Stone Ghost
steps: Defeat 40 Broken Stone Ghosts or Stone Ghosts (Near Chins Tomb)

name: Cleaning Tomb Stones
steps: Gather all the stone pieces need for quest

name: Tree Spirit
steps: Defeat Decayed Yeoha or Yeoha for 30 “Yeoha Black Blood“
rewards: item: lv 10 weapon of your class

name: Adventurer's Stone
steps: Defeat Stone Ghost for 20 Adventurers

name: Purification Ground
steps: Take the Yeoha Black Blood to Indian Buddhist Monk KUSHYAN (6596,1163) and return to MYOSORYEONG

name: Sweeping Bandit Archer
steps: Defeat 50 Bandit Archer

name: Bandit Operation Map
steps: Defeat Bandit Archer for 20 Operation Map pieces

name: Sweeping Bandit
steps: Defeat 50 Bandits or Bandit subordinates

name: Tiger Grinding Tooth
steps: Defeat Young Tiger or Tiger for 10 Molar Teeth

name: Tiger Hunting Competition
steps: Step 1: Defeat 1 Tiger champion, 20 Tiger and 20 Young Tiger and return to him
Step 1: Defeat 3 Tiger champion, 30 Tiger and 30 Young Tiger and return to him
Step 1: Defeat 5 Tiger champion, 40 Tiger and 40 Young Tiger and return to him
rewards: item: Tiger's Violence scroll (Increases damage by 20% for 1 hour)

name: Cheolhyeon Anger
steps: Defeat 200 Bandit Bowman
rewards: item: First-class Transsexual tool scroll (Change any defensive item under 3 degree gender)

name: Stolen Sword
steps: Defeat Bandits once you get the stolen sword,return it to GWAKI

name: Hunting white tigers
steps: Defeat 40 White Tiger

name: Herb Delivery
steps: Take a packet of herbs to Ferry ticker seller CHAU (444,9928) at Chinese Western Ferry and return to YANGYUN

name: Yangyun Request
steps: Delivery 2 books to DOJI (4449,928) at Eastern Ferry and CHAU (444,9928) at Western Ferry. Return to YANGYUN for rewards

name: Black Tiger Talon
steps: Defeat Black Tiger for 60 Black Tiger Claw

name: White Tiger Skin
steps: Step 1: Defeat White Tiger for 100 White Tiger Skin and return to him
Step 2: Defeat White Tiger for 100 White Tiger Skin and return to him
Step 3: Defeat White Tiger for 200 White Tiger Skin and return to him
rewards: item: Tiger Strength Scroll(Absorb 20% damage for 1 hour)

name: Folk Remedy
steps: Defeat Chakji Worker or Chakji for 100 Chakji eyes

name: Chakji Hunting
steps: Defeat 600 Chakji Worker or Chakji
rewards: item: Reverse Return scroll(Return to the original spot that you casted your “returning scroll”)

name: Ghost Bug Eggs
steps: Defeat Ghost Bug or Devil Bug for 10 Bug Eggs

name: Hyungno's Revengeful Spirit
steps: Defeat 30 Hyungno Ghost Soldier or Hyungno Ghost

name: Leegak's Secret
steps: Defeat Ghost Bug or Devil Bug for 150 Ghost Bug Eggs

name: Peace Maker
steps: Defeat Devil Bug for 100 Devil Wings
rewards: item: Wing's Gesture(20% increase evasion rate for 1 hour)

name: Demon Horse's Malice
steps: Defeat 60 Demon Horse or Devil Horse and return to MAKHO

name: Memorial Service for Horse
steps: Defeat Demon Horse or Devil Horse for 50 Hooves

name: Trickery
steps: Defeat Hyungno Ghost Soldier for 200 “Hyungno Ghost Soldier Flags“

name: Flying Man Over Running Man
steps: Defeat Hyungno Ghost for 200 ” Hyungno Ghost Flags”

name: Martial Art Tournament
steps: Take 2 “tournament application” scrolls to General SONHEYON (Jangan 6206,1177)

name: Making Yeosun Firecracker
steps: Defeat Meek Gun Powder or Gun Powder for 20 “Gun Powder Bombs“

name: A Big Win
steps: Defeat Meek Gun Powder or Gun Powder for 200 “Gun Powder Bombs”

name: Firecrack Delivery
steps: Speak with YEOSUN,you'll get a “Firework Bundle“,Take it to JINJIN (Jangan 6498,1067)
rewards: item: Lucid Light scroll (20% increase Attack Rating for 3600 Seconds)

name: Earth Ghost Hunting
steps: Defeat 500 Earth Ghost or Meek Earth Ghost

name: Leegak's Grudge
steps: Defeat 30 Hyeongcheon

name: Earth Taoist's Charm
steps: Defeat Earth Taoist or Earth Magician for 15 amulets

name: Bad Charm #1
steps: Defeat Earth Taoist or Earth Magician for 100 rarity charms

name: Bad Charm #2
steps: Defeat Earth Taoist or Earth Magician for 200 rarity charms

name: Inventory Expansion 2
steps: Defeat Earth Taoist and help YEOSUN Gather Magic Charms.

name: Birthday Present Material
steps: Defeat Scorpion for 200 Poisons of Scorpion

name: Lachrymal Birthday Present
steps: Step 1: Speak with LEEGAK (3497,2078) in Donwhang
Step 2: Go to Jangan and Speak with JINJIN (6498,1067)

name: Lost Ring
steps: Defeat Blood Ong or Ong once you get the lost ring,return it to MANHO

name: Ancient Elf
steps: Defeat 1000 Blood Devil Flower or Blood Death Flower

name: Leegeuk's Jewel
steps: Defeat Black Robber Follower or Black Robber for 200 Jewel of Leegeuk

name: Yeowa's Scale
steps: Defeat Heukyeowa or Black Yeowa for 300 Yeowas scale

name: Asa's Grumble
steps: Speak with LEEGUK to receive Asas flute

name: Wangwon's request
steps: Go to Jangan and Speak with Lottery seller WANGWON

name: Looking for Chinese Liquor
steps: Step 1: Defeat Hyeongcheon for 100 Hyeongcheon powders
Step 2: Defeat Ong for 100 Ongs feelers
Step 3: Defeat Small Red Scorpion for 100 Legs of Small Red Scorpion
Step 4: Return to YANGYUN

name: Looking for European Liquor
steps: Step 1: Defeat Earth Magician for 100 eyebrows of Earth Magician
Step 2: Defeat Blood Death Flower for 100 Blood Death Flowers leaves
Step 3: Defeat Red Scorpion for 100 Legs of Red Scorpion
Step 4: Return to FLORA

name: Huhoan's Book
steps: Go to Jangan and Speak with Lottery seller WANGWON

name: Drinking with Huhoan
steps: Go to Jangan Gambling house and Speak with HUHOAN.Give him the wine,When he says he wants more, ask about that book, and exchange it for the flute

name: Hidden Jewel
steps: Defeat Black Robber Archer for 100 expensive jewels

name: Black Robber Bowsman's Bow
steps: Defeat Black Robber Bowman for 200 bows

name: Looking for Armor Materials
steps: Defeat Red Scorpion or Small Red Scorpion for 20 Red Scorpion Shells

name: Dead Ravine
steps: Defeat 20 Red-eye Ghost or Dark-eye Ghost in 2 hours

name: Broken Paddle
steps: Defeat Hyeongcheon for 100 Hard Stones

name: Seeking Paddle Material
steps: Defeat Red-eye Ghost or Dark-eye Ghost for 100 Agols Irons

name: Delivering Paddle
steps: Send 50 Paddles to Oasis Ticket agent SALMAI (1574,18)

name: Bunwang highest grade nephrite
steps: Defeat Small Bunwang or Bunwang for 175 highest grade nephrite

name: Clearing ultra blood devil
steps: Defeat 750 Ultra Blood Devil

name: Duyuns Revenge
steps: Defeat 820 Golden Spider or White spider

name: Sweeping Mujigi
steps: Defeat Mujigi or Ujigi for 250 fingernails of Mujigis
notes: PS: You can get this quest just at night.

name: Seeking Ishades Ices
steps: Defeat Ishade or Hashade for 125 Ishade Ice

name: White Face Spider Web
steps: Defeat Blue-Face Spider or White-Face Spider for 210 White Spider Web

name: Yeti stick
steps: Defeat Yeti or Devil Yeti for120 Yeti sticks

name: Inventory Expansion 3
steps: Defeat Big White spider and help MAMPJE Gather Tough spider webs.

name: Solid Bug Ghost's shell
steps: Defeat Soil Ghost Bug or Earth Ghost Bug for 15 bug ghost's shell

name: Sand Monster Tribe
steps: Defeat 1200 Shakram or Edimmu

name: Hiring hunter guild
steps: Defeat 1500 Power Earth Ghost

name: Baeksong's letter
steps: Step 1: Speak with Jangan Islam merchant ISHYAK (6503,1017)
Step 2: Speak with Hotan Stable merchant SALIHAP (153,5)
Step 3: Return to BAEKSONG
notes: PS:He only gives 5 players quest one day

name: Sweeping Earth Ghost Warrior
steps: Defeat 1600 Earth Ghost Warrior or Earth Ghost Soldier

name: Mamoje's Bet
steps: Defeat Dark Kara or Death Kara to gain 20 teeth
notes: Note: Time limited. 2 hours per quest and need to be done in 4 days.

name: King of digging
steps: Defeat Blind Mole or Mole for 340 goi claws

name: Second Bet (Soboi)
steps: Defeat Demon Eye or Devil Eye to gain 300 eyes
notes: Note: You can only choose one quest between Second Bet(Soboi) and Second Bet(Mamoje). I suggest you choose the one with exp reward.

name: Second Bet (Mamoje)
steps: Defeat Demon Eye or Devil Eye to gain 300 eyes
notes: Note: You can only choose one quest between Second Bet(Soboi) and Second Bet(Mamoje). I suggest you choose the one with exp reward.

name: Ghost of dazzlement
steps: Defeat Devil Ghost Nachal or Devil Mask Nachal for 1 Nachal antidote
notes: PS:you need to get back to the npc that gave you this quest within 15 minutes after you get the quest item. No tele scroll or horse can be used , but you can use horse after you get out from dungeon.

name: Paedo's request
steps: Defeat Gold-Silver Yachal or Diamond Yachal for 250 pieces of diamond and 250 pieces of gold

name: Collecting Buddhist scriptures
steps: Retrieve the 4 books of scriptures

name: Last Bet (Soboi)
steps: Defeat Niya Soldier or Niya Guard to gain 200 spears
notes: Note: You can only choose one quest between Last Bet(Soboi) and Last Bet(Mamoje). I suggest you choose the one with exp reward.

name: Last Bet (Mamoje)
steps: Defeat Niya Soldier or Niya Guard to gain 200 spears
notes: Note: You can only choose one quest between Last Bet(Soboi) and Last Bet(Mamoje). I suggest you choose the one with exp reward.

name: Sweeping Niya Archers
steps: Defeat 1700 Niya Sniper or Niya Hunter

name: Research on Ancient Niya Magic
steps: Niya Mage or Niya Shaman

name: Lost Horseshoe
steps: Niya Royal Guard or Niya General

name: Noise Pollution
steps: Defeat 300 Ujigis

name: The Powerful Looking Accessory
steps: Gather 30 Ujigi teeth

name: Ensuring Pedestrian Safety
steps: Defeat 300 Mujigis

name: Hunting the Giant Creature
steps: Defeat 300 Big Blue Spiders

name: The Threat to Warriors
steps: Defeat 300 Penon Fighters

name: The Curious Artisan
steps: Gather 150 Broken Shield Pieces

name: Materials for the Cold Accessory
steps: Gather 150 Broken Ice Pieces

name: Subjugating the Frenzied Creature
steps: Defeat 300 Planars

name: Rumor of the Giant Spider
steps: Defeat 300 Big White Spiders

name: The Protector of Karakoram
steps: Defeat 300 Penon Warriors

name: The Frightening Ice Spirit
steps: Defeat 300 Sonas

name: The Accursed Morning Alarm
steps: Gather 250 Gory Voice Cords

name: The Mana Crystal of Ice Magic
steps: Gather 30 Sona's Magic Globes

name: Turtle Invigorant
steps: Gather 150 Big Blue Spider Eggs

name: Very Useful Cooking Ingredient
steps: Gather 70 Big White Spider Legs

name: The Endless Winter Nightmare
steps: Defeat 300 Ishades

name: Exterminating the Spiders
steps: Defeat 300 Blue Spiders

name: The Ceaseless Terror
steps: Defeat 300 White Spiders

name: Manina's request
steps: Gather 100 White-Face Spider webs
